Friction Signals

CRITICAL 4 journey(s) could not complete the purchase

Journeys J1_desktop, J1_mobile, J5_desktop, J5_mobile failed — customers hitting this path cannot convert. Check the failed step and its error message.

WARNING 28 journey step(s) exceeded acceptable load time

Slowest step: 31.3s. Delays > 3s increase abandonment by 32% (Google research).

CRITICAL 379 JS error(s) across 35 journey step(s)

JavaScript errors during navigation can break cart/checkout functionality silently. Review the console errors per step.

Page Scores
Shopify: 70 Technical: 100 Trust: 96 Conversion: 100 Performance: 100
✓ Mobile cart icon OK
Excessive scripts detected (53 total, 15 app scripts)
critical
1 second delay = 7% conversion drop. Slow stores drive 40%+ bounce rate increase.
The page loads 53 external scripts. Each Shopify app installed adds scripts that accumulate and slow the store.
Audit installed apps in Shopify admin. Remove unused apps. Each unused app slows load time.
Performance / Apps
No privacy policy link in site footer
warning
POPIA (South African law) requires visible privacy notice. Legal exposure if absent.
No privacy policy or POPIA notice link detected anywhere on the homepage. This is reported once — the fix is a single change to footer.liquid.
Add a privacy policy link to footer.liquid. Shopify auto-generates /policies/privacy-policy — link to it from the footer nav.
Legal Compliance
